metadata.description: The Agenthood Society — 14 specialized agent skills for the full software engineering lifecycle: architecture, TDD, debugging, code review, security audit, commit messages, changelogs, documentation, institutional knowledge, cross-provider validation, drift detection, code smell enforcement, context stewardship, and release management.

plugins.name: agenthood-all
plugins.description: All 14 Agenthood members — every skill for every stage of the engineering lifecycle. Architecture, TDD, debugging, code review, security audit, commit messages, PR descriptions, changelogs, documentation, institutional knowledge, cross-provider translation, structural drift detection, code smell enforcement, context management, and release management.

plugins.name: agenthood-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering workflow skills: commit messages & PR descriptions (the-scribe), spec-first architecture planning (the-architect), TDD test generation (the-tester), and systematic error diagnosis (the-debugger).

plugins.name: agenthood-validation
plugins.description: Validation and quality skills: multi-axis code review (the-reviewer), security & dependency audit (the-auditor), commit/PR/branch convention enforcement (the-doorman), cross-member contradiction detection (the-sentinel), and code smell & complexity enforcement (the-warden).

plugins.name: agenthood-knowledge
plugins.description: Knowledge and documentation skills: API references, ADRs, READMEs (the-librarian) and institutional knowledge about member format, naming conventions, and Society structure (the-oracle).

plugins.name: agenthood-lifecycle
plugins.description: Release lifecycle skills: semantic versioning, changelogs, release notes (the-herald), cross-provider translation and bootstrap generation (the-envoy), and context window management and member routing (the-steward).
